name: Stellar
analysis: XLM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $0.2388, stop $0.1795, target $0.2966 (0.97:1) — then trail it.
